theme: Meeting a client for the first time

vocab.example: You only get one chance to make a first impression.
vocab.example_vi: Bạn chỉ có một cơ hội để tạo ấn tượng đầu tiên.

vocab.meaning_vi: chuyện phiếm, trò chuyện xã giao
vocab.example: We made some small talk before the meeting started.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi trò chuyện xã giao một chút trước khi cuộc họp bắt đầu.

vocab.example: Let me give you my business card before we start.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi đưa bạn danh thiếp trước khi chúng ta bắt đầu.

vocab.example: It's important to build rapport with a new client early.
vocab.example_vi: Việc xây dựng thiện cảm với khách hàng mới ngay từ đầu rất quan trọng.

vocab.example: He greeted me with a firm, friendly handshake.
vocab.example_vi: Anh ấy chào tôi bằng một cái bắt tay chắc chắn, thân thiện.

vocab.example: I'll be your main point of contact going forward.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ là đầu mối liên hệ chính của bạn từ giờ trở đi.

vocab.example: Let me share a bit of our company background first.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi chia sẻ một chút thông tin nền về công ty chúng tôi trước.

vocab.example: Thank you for the warm welcome to your office.
vocab.example_vi: Cảm ơn vì sự chào đón nồng nhiệt tại văn phòng của bạn.

listening.title: Meeting a new client for the first time

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Hi, I'm Nam from Tech Solutions. Nice to finally meet you.

lines.speaker: Hương (client)
lines.text: Nice to meet you too, Nam. Thanks for the warm welcome.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Let me give you my business card before we start.

lines.speaker: Hương (client)
lines.text: Thank you. Here's mine too, in case you need to call.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Before we begin, let me share our company background briefly.

lines.speaker: Hương (client)
lines.text: Sure, I'd love to hear a bit about your company.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Great. I always try to build rapport with new clients.

lines.speaker: Hương (client)
lines.text: I appreciate that, it makes this meeting feel more comfortable.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: I'll be your main point of contact going forward.

lines.speaker: Hương (client)
lines.text: Perfect, that first impression really puts me at ease.

questions.q: Why does Nam give Hương his business card?
options: So she can contact him later

questions.q: What does Nam try to build with new clients?
What role will Nam have going forward?

shadowing: You only get one chance to make a good first impression.
We made some small talk together before the meeting started.
Let me give you my business card before we begin.
It's important to build rapport with every new client early.
I'll be your main point of contact from now on.
